description:
The '## Config (.balls/config.json)' section (README line 985) is the canonical config reference, but has drifted from src/config.rs:

- The example JSON (line 999) still lists "tasks_dir": null, while the field table 23 lines below it (line 1022) explicitly says tasks_dir was *removed in 0.3.4*. The canonical example contradicts its own table; config.rs confirms there is no tasks_dir field. Drop it from the example block.
- The 'review' block (review.pre_check) is a real Config field (pub review: Option<ReviewConfig>) and is documented in prose as the 'Pre-squash review gate' (README lines 48, 419-427), but appears in neither the example JSON nor the field table. Add a row + example entry.
- Minor: 'version' is in the example JSON but has no field-table row.

Why it matters: the section is presented as authoritative. An example that ships a field removed two minor versions ago while omitting a current one actively misleads anyone hand-writing .balls/config.json.

Scope: distinct from bl-7cea (master_url/state_remote/federation, which is SPEC-dep-blocked) -- these defects are independent of federation and unblocked. Parallels bl-9c17 for the Task schema. Audited 2026-05-20.
title: README: config example lists removed tasks_dir, omits review.pre_check
